title: Criminal Justice Board for Wales Annual Report 2024 to 25
body: "The Criminal Justice Board for Wales (‘Board’) brings together criminal justice partners including: His Majesty’s Prison and Probation Service (HMPPS), His Majesty’s Courts and Tribunal Service (HMCTS), the Youth Justice Board, Police services in Wales, Chief Constables in Wales, Police and Crime Commissioners in Wales, the Crown Prosecution Service, Public Health Wales, Welsh Government, the Welsh Local Government Association, Voluntary Sector bodies and the Victims Commissioner. "
